equity.label: S&P 500 equity pressure
equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

rates.note: A rise in front-end yields can tighten financial conditions.

title: 2025-12-18 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 14.75
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-12-18: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 14.75/100, signaling a low pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-12-18, the score printed 14.75/100 in the low regime, with equity stress and volatility doing most of the work.
